calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Koroosh Afshari; Clerk: JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, Scott I. Bassin, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendants, Karina Garcia and Eduardo Garcia, are present.
Attorney, James D. Ragon, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 3356 24th Street, South East Room, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-09-2009 is vacated.
